input: Identify four drugs that are commonly administered with <DRUG>19041823</DRUG> in the most recent hospital stay.
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;
pred:
SELECT 
  d2.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN concept d1 ON de.drug_concept_id = d1.concept_id
  JOIN concept d2 ON de.drug_concept_id = d2.concept_id
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON de.person_id = co.person_id
  JOIN condition_era ce ON co.person_id = ce.person_id
WHERE 
  de.drug_concept_id = (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name = '<DRUG>19041823</DRUG>')
  AND ce.condition_era_start_date = (SELECT MAX(ce2.condition_era_start_date) FROM condition_era ce2 WHERE ce2.person_id = ce.person_id)
  AND ce.condition_era_end_date = (SELECT MAX(ce2.condition_era_end_date) FROM condition_era ce2 WHERE ce2.person_id = ce.person_id)
  AND de.visit_occurrence_id = co.visit_occurrence_id
  AND de.visit_occurrence_id = ce.visit_occurrence_id
GROUP BY 
  d2.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 4;

input: In the most recent hospital visit, which drugs were most commonly prescribed with <DRUG>19041823</DRUG>?
gold: WITH last_visits AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (vo.person_id) vo.visit_occurrence_id FROM visit_occurrence AS vo ORDER BY vo.person_id, vo.visit_start_date DESC), patients_with_19041823 AS (SELECT lv.visit_occurrence_id FROM last_visits AS lv JOIN drug_exposure AS de1 ON lv.visit_occurrence_id = de1.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de1.drug_concept_id = 19041823), co_prescribed_drugs AS (SELECT de2.drug_concept_id FROM drug_exposure de2 JOIN patients_with_19041823 AS p ON de2.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id WHERE de2.drug_concept_id != 19041823) SELECT d.drug_concept_id AS concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM co_prescribed_drugs AS d JOIN concept AS c ON d.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 4;
pred:
SELECT 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  d.drug_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON de.person_id = co.person_id
  JOIN condition_era ce ON co.person_id = ce.person_id AND ce.condition_era_start_date <= co.condition_start_date AND (ce.condition_era_end_date IS NULL OR ce.condition_era_end_date > co.condition_start_date)
  JOIN concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE 
  c.concept_name = '<DRUG>19041823</DRUG>'
  AND de.visit_occurrence_id IN (
    SELECT 
      vo.visit_occurrence_id
    FROM 
      visit_occurrence vo
      JOIN visit_detail vd ON vo.visit_occurrence_id = vd.visit_occurrence_id
    WHERE 
      vo.visit_start_date = (SELECT MAX(vo2.visit_start_date) FROM visit_occurrence vo2)
  )
GROUP BY 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  d.drug_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC;

input: What are the leading 3 diagnoses from last month in patients aged 60 or more?
gold: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 60 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;
pred:
SELECT 
  c.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  condition_occurrence co
  JOIN condition c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
  JOIN person p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
  p.year_of_birth <= 1963
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM co.condition_start_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM co.condition_start_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
  c.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 3;

input: Provide the 4 most prescribed drugs for young women (20s) after being diagnosed with <CONDITION>318800</CONDITION> this month/02.
gold: WITH target_conditions AS (SELECT c.person_id, c.condition_start_date FROM condition_occurrence AS c JOIN person AS p ON p.person_id = c.person_id WHERE c.condition_concept_id = 318800 AND c.condition_start_date = MAKE_DATE(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)::int, 2) AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(c.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 20 AND 29), drug_within_2_days AS (SELECT d.drug_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS freq FROM drug_exposure AS d JOIN target_conditions AS tc ON d.person_id = tc.person_id WHERE d.drug_exposure_start_date BETWEEN tc.condition_start_date AND tc.condition_start_date + INTERVAL '2 days' GROUP BY d.drug_concept_id) SELECT dwd.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name AS drug_name, dwd.freq FROM drug_within_2_days dwd JOIN concept AS c ON c.concept_id = dwd.drug_concept_id ORDER BY dwd.freq DESC LIMIT 4;
pred:
SELECT 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  c.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON de.person_id = co.person_id AND de.condition_start_date = co.condition_start_date
  JOIN person p ON de.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
  c.concept_id IN (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name = 'Diabetes Mellitus') 
  AND p.gender_concept_id = 8532 
  AND p.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1990 AND 1999 
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM de.drug_exposure_start_date) = 2 
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM de.drug_exposure_start_date) = 2022 
  AND de.drug_exposure_start_date >= '2022-02-01' 
  AND de.drug_exposure_start_date < '2022-03-01' 
GROUP BY 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  c.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 4;

input: Identify the top three frequent drug uses from the last 3 months?

SELECT 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  c.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as frequency
FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE 
  de.person_id IN (
    SELECT 
      p.person_id
    FROM 
      person p
      JOIN visit_occurrence vo ON p.person_id = vo.person_id
    WHERE 
      vo.visit_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 month')::date
      AND vo.visit_start_date <= CURRENT_DATE
  )
  AND de.drug_exposure_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '3 month')::date
  AND de.drug_exposure_start_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 
  d.drug_concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  frequency DESC

input: What are the 5 most frequently observed specimens that patients have been tested during the same month as having received a <PROCEDURE>4300757</PROCEDURE> procedure during that hospital visit?
gold: SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS specimen_count FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN visit_occurrence AS vo ON po.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id JOIN specimen AS s ON s.person_id = po.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime >= po.procedure_datetime AND DATE_TRUNC('month', s.specimen_date) = DATE_TRUNC('month', po.procedure_date) JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 4300757 AND vo.visit_type_concept_id = 32220 GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY specimen_count DESC LIMIT 5;
pred:
SELECT 
  s.specimen_concept_id, 
  s.specimen_type_concept_id, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  specimen s
  JOIN visit_occurrence v ON s.person_id = v.person_id
  JOIN procedure_occurrence p ON v.visit_occurrence_id = p.visit_occurrence_id
WHERE 
  p.procedure_concept_id = 4300757
  AND s.specimen_date >= v.visit_start_date
  AND s.specimen_date <= v.visit_end_date
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM s.specimen_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM v.visit_start_date)
GROUP BY 
  s.specimen_concept_id, 
  s.specimen_type_concept_id
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 5;

input: What are the top 3 lab tests frequently ordered after diagnosis with <CONDITION>4229440</CONDITION> during the same ICU stay up to 2203?
gold: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 4229440 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2204-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2204-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;
pred:
SELECT 
  m.measurement_concept_id, 
  m.measurement_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  measurement m
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON m.person_id = co.person_id
  JOIN condition_era ce ON co.person_id = ce.person_id AND ce.condition_concept_id = co.condition_concept_id
WHERE 
  m.measurement_concept_id IN (
    SELECT 
      mc.concept_id 
    FROM 
      concept mc 
    WHERE 
      mc.concept_name LIKE '%lab test%'
  )
  AND ce.condition_concept_id = 4229440
  AND m.measurement_date <= ce.condition_era_end_date
  AND m.measurement_date >= ce.condition_era_start_date
  AND m.visit_occurrence_id IN (
    SELECT 
      vo.visit_occurrence_id 
    FROM 
      visit_occurrence vo 
    WHERE 
      vo.visit_type_concept_id = 405137011
  )
GROUP BY 
  m.measurement_concept_id, m.measurement_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 3;

gold: WITH icu_visits AS (SELECT vd.visit_detail_id FROM visit_detail AS vd JOIN concept AS c ON vd.visit_detail_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE c.concept_name ILIKE '%intensive care%'), condition_in_icu AS (SELECT co.visit_detail_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN icu_visits AS iv ON co.visit_detail_id = iv.visit_detail_id WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 37160824 AND co.condition_start_datetime < '2021-01-01'), labs_after_condition AS (SELECT m.measurement_concept_id FROM measurement AS m JOIN condition_in_icu AS co ON m.visit_detail_id = co.visit_detail_id AND m.measurement_datetime >= co.condition_start_datetime WHERE m.measurement_datetime < '2021-01-01') SELECT c.concept_name AS test_name, l.measurement_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM labs_after_condition AS l JOIN concept AS c ON l.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY l.measurement_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 3;
pred:
SELECT 
  m.measurement_concept_id, 
  m.measurement_name, 
  COUNT(*) as frequency
FROM 
  measurement m
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON m.person_id = co.person_id
  JOIN visit_occurrence vo ON co.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id
  JOIN visit_detail vd ON vo.visit_occurrence_id = vd.visit_occurrence_id
WHERE 
  m.measurement_concept_id IN (
    SELECT 
      m2.measurement_concept_id
    FROM 
      measurement m2
      JOIN condition_occurrence co2 ON m2.person_id = co2.person_id
      JOIN visit_occurrence vo2 ON co2.visit_occurrence_id = vo2.visit_occurrence_id
      JOIN visit_detail vd2 ON vo2.visit_occurrence_id = vd2.visit_occurrence_id
    WHERE 
      co2.condition_concept_id = 37160824
      AND vo2.visit_concept_id IN (
        SELECT 
          vc.visit_concept_id
        FROM 
          visit_concept vc
        WHERE 
          vc.visit_type_concept_id = 40514265  -- ICU
      )
      AND vd2.visit_detail_type_concept_id = 40514265  -- ICU
      AND m2.measurement_date < '2021-01-01'
  )
  AND m.measurement_date < '2021-01-01'
GROUP BY 
  m.measurement_concept_id, 
  m.measurement_name
ORDER BY 
  frequency DESC
LIMIT 3;

input: What are the six leading conditions persisting for more than a year among patients between 50 and 59 years old until the end of January 2187?
gold: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;
pred:
WITH 
  -- Get patients between 50 and 59 years old
  patients AS (
    SELECT person_id
    FROM person
    WHERE year_of_birth BETWEEN 1928 AND 1937
  ),
  
  -- Get conditions persisting for more than a year
  conditions AS (
    SELECT 
      ce.condition_concept_id,
      ce.condition_era_start_date,
      ce.condition_era_end_date
    FROM condition_era ce
    WHERE ce.condition_era_end_date <= '2187-01-31'
  ),
  
  -- Get leading conditions
  leading_conditions AS (
    SELECT 
      c.condition_concept_id,
      COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM conditions c
    GROUP BY c.condition_concept_id
    ORDER BY count DESC
    LIMIT 6
  )

SELECT 
  c.concept_name
FROM 
  concept c
  JOIN leading_conditions lc ON c.concept_id = lc.condition_concept_id
WHERE 
  c.domain_id = 'Anatomy'
  AND c.standard_concept = 'S'
  AND c.valid_start_date <= '2187-01-01'
  AND c.valid_end_date >= '2187-01-01';

input: What are the top 6 conditions lasting over a year among patients between 50 and 59 years old up to Jan 2187?
gold: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;
pred:
SELECT 
  ce.condition_concept_id, 
  c.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  condition_era ce
  JOIN condition c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
  JOIN person p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
  p.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1928 AND 1937
  AND p.year_of_birth IS NOT NULL
  AND ce.condition_era_end_date > '1987-01-01'
  AND ce.condition_era_start_date <= '1987-01-01'
  AND ce.condition_occurrence_count > 1
GROUP BY 
  ce.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 6;

input: What are the 6 most common conditions extending exceeding one year among individuals aged 50 to 59 before 01 February 2187?
gold: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;
pred:
WITH 
    -- Get the conditions for individuals aged 50-59 before 01 February 2187
    conditions AS (
        SELECT 
            ce.condition_concept_id, 
            ce.person_id, 
            ce.condition_start_date, 
            ce.condition_end_date
        FROM 
            condition_occurrence ce
        WHERE 
            ce.person_id IN (
                SELECT 
                    p.person_id
                FROM 
                    person p
                WHERE 
                    p.year_of_birth BETWEEN 1928 AND 1937
            )
            AND ce.condition_start_date <= '2187-02-01'
            AND ce.condition_end_date > '2187-02-01'
    ),
    -- Calculate the duration of each condition
    condition_durations AS (
        SELECT 
            condition_concept_id, 
            person_id, 
            condition_start_date, 
            condition_end_date, 
            DATEDIFF(condition_end_date, condition_start_date) AS duration
        FROM 
            conditions
    ),
    -- Filter conditions with duration exceeding one year
    long_conditions AS (
        SELECT 
            condition_concept_id, 
            person_id, 
            condition_start_date, 
            condition_end_date, 
            duration
        FROM 
            condition_durations
        WHERE 
            duration > 365
    ),
    -- Group by condition and count the number of individuals
    condition_counts AS (
        SELECT 
            condition_concept_id, 
            COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM 
            long_conditions
        GROUP BY 
            condition_concept_id
        ORDER BY 
            count DESC
        LIMIT 6
    )

input: What are the six most prevalent conditions lasting over a year among patients in their fifties up to and including January 2187?
gold: SELECT c.concept_id, c.concept_name AS condition_name, COUNT(*) AS condition_count FROM condition_era AS ce JOIN person AS p ON ce.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE ce.condition_era_start_date < DATE '2187-02-01' AND ce.condition_era_end_date > ce.condition_era_start_date + INTERVAL '1 year' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM age(ce.condition_era_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) BETWEEN 50 AND 59 GROUP BY c.concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY condition_count DESC LIMIT 6;
pred:
WITH 
    -- Get patients in their fifties up to and including January 2187
    patients AS (
        SELECT person_id
        FROM person
        WHERE year_of_birth BETWEEN 1937 AND 1977
    ),
    
    -- Get conditions lasting over a year
    conditions AS (
        SELECT c.condition_concept_id, COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM condition_occurrence co
        JOIN patients p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
        WHERE co.condition_start_date <= '2187-01-01'::date
        AND co.condition_end_date > '2187-01-01'::date
        GROUP BY c.condition_concept_id
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    ),
    
    -- Get the six most prevalent conditions
    top_conditions AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM conditions
        ORDER BY count DESC
        LIMIT 6
    )

SELECT c.concept_name
FROM concept c
JOIN top_conditions t ON c.concept_id = t.condition_concept_id;

input: For the most recent 5 patients who had a <PROCEDURE>42536500</PROCEDURE> after their last stop of <DRUG>1308251</DRUG> taken via <DRUG_ROUTE>4156707</DRUG_ROUTE>, what were the discontinuation date and reason?
gold: WITH drug_patients AS (SELECT de.person_id, de.drug_exposure_end_date, de.drug_exposure_end_datetime, stop_reason FROM drug_exposure AS de WHERE de.drug_concept_id = 1308251 AND de.route_concept_id = 4156707), last_drug_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (drp.person_id) drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime FROM drug_patients AS drp ORDER BY drp.person_id, drp.drug_exposure_end_datetime DESC), last_procedure_patients AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (po.person_id) po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime FROM procedure_occurrence AS po JOIN drug_patients AS dp ON po.person_id = dp.person_id WHERE po.procedure_concept_id = 42536500 ORDER BY po.person_id, po.procedure_datetime DESC), last_patients AS (SELECT lpp.person_id, ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime, lpp.procedure_datetime FROM last_procedure_patients AS lpp JOIN last_drug_patients AS ldp ON lpp.person_id = ldp.person_id WHERE lpp.procedure_datetime > ldp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lpp.procedure_datetime DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT dps.person_id, dps.drug_exposure_end_date, dps.stop_reason FROM drug_patients AS dps JOIN last_patients AS lp ON dps.person_id = lp.person_id WHERE dps.drug_exposure_end_datetime = lp.drug_exposure_end_datetime ORDER BY lp.procedure_datetime;

SELECT 
  ce.condition_end_date AS discontinuation_date,
  ce.stop_reason AS reason
FROM 
  condition_occurrence ce
  JOIN condition_era ce2 ON ce.condition_era_id = ce2.condition_era_id
  JOIN drug_exposure de ON ce.person_id = de.person_id
  JOIN concept c ON ce.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id AND c.concept_code = '42536500'
  JOIN concept d ON de.drug_concept_id = d.concept_id AND d.concept_code = '1308251'
  JOIN concept dr ON de.drug_route_concept_id = dr.concept_id AND dr.concept_code = '4156707'
WHERE 
  ce2.condition_era_end_date IS NULL
  AND ce.condition_end_date > (SELECT MAX(de.drug_exposure_end_date) FROM drug_exposure de WHERE de.person_id = ce.person_id AND de.drug_concept_id = d.concept_id)
ORDER BY 
  ce.condition_end_date DESC
LIMIT 5;

input: Since the beginning of last month, which 5 specimens were most frequently collected within 14 days of a <CONDITION>760859</CONDITION> diagnosis?
gold: WITH condition_occurrence_filtered AS (SELECT co.person_id, co.condition_start_datetime FROM condition_occurrence AS co WHERE co.condition_concept_id = 760859 AND co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '1 month'), specimen_within_14_days AS (SELECT s.specimen_concept_id FROM specimen AS s JOIN condition_occurrence_filtered AS cof ON s.person_id = cof.person_id AND s.specimen_datetime BETWEEN cof.condition_start_datetime AND cof.condition_start_datetime + INTERVAL '14 days') SELECT s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name AS specimen_name, COUNT(*) AS frequency FROM specimen_within_14_days AS s JOIN concept AS c ON s.specimen_concept_id = c.concept_id GROUP BY s.specimen_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY frequency DESC LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
  s.specimen_id, 
  s.specimen_concept_id, 
  s.specimen_date, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  specimen s
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON s.person_id = co.person_id
  JOIN concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE 
  c.concept_name = 'Diabetes Mellitus' 
  AND s.specimen_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month')::date 
  AND s.specimen_date <= CURRENT_DATE 
  AND s.specimen_date <= DATE_TRUNC('day', co.condition_start_date) + INTERVAL '14 day'
GROUP BY 
  s.specimen_id, 
  s.specimen_concept_id, 
  s.specimen_date
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 5;

  d.drug_concept_id, 
  c.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON de.person_id = co.person_id AND de.condition_start_date = co.condition_start_date
WHERE 
  c.concept_id IN (
    SELECT 
      concept_id 
    FROM 
      concept 
    WHERE 
      concept_name = '<CONDITION>134865</CONDITION>'
  )
  AND de.person_id IN (
    SELECT 
      person_id 
    FROM 
      person 
    WHERE 
      year_of_birth BETWEEN 1980 AND 1989
  )
  AND de.condition_start_date = (
    SELECT 
      DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)) + INTERVAL '1 month'
  )
  AND de.drug_exposure_start_date <= (
    SELECT 
      DATE_TRUNC('day', DATE_TRUNC('month', DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)) + INTERVAL '1 month') + INTERVAL '23 day'
  )
GROUP BY

  d2.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  drug_exposure de

input: Which two diagnoses were most frequent in patients 18+ during the past month?
gold: SELECT co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM condition_occurrence AS co JOIN person AS p ON co.person_id = p.person_id JOIN concept AS c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id WHERE date_part('year', age(co.condition_start_date, p.birth_datetime)) >= 18 AND co.condition_start_date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND co.condition_start_date < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY co.condition_concept_id, c.concept_name ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
  c1.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  condition_occurrence co
  JOIN condition c1 ON co.condition_concept_id = c1.concept_id
  JOIN person p ON co.person_id = p.person_id
WHERE 
  p.year_of_birth < 2004 AND 
  co.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND 
  co.condition_start_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY 
  c1.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC
LIMIT 2;

input: Find recent articles on <CONDITION>1076483</CONDITION> care in <CAREUNIT>4737</CAREUNIT>.
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT 
  ce.condition_concept_id, 
  ce.condition_start_date, 
  ce.condition_end_date, 
  vo.visit_occurrence_id, 
  vo.visit_start_date, 
  vo.visit_end_date, 
  p.person_id, 
  p.gender_concept_id, 
  p.year_of_birth, 
  p.location_id, 
  d.death_date, 
  d.death_datetime
FROM 
  condition_occurrence ce
  JOIN visit_occurrence vo ON ce.visit_occurrence_id = vo.visit_occurrence_id
  JOIN person p ON vo.person_id = p.person_id

  ce.condition_concept_id = 1076483

  AND ce.condition_start_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
  AND ce.condition_end_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year')
ORDER BY 
  ce.condition_start_date DESC;

input: What was the average difference between charge time and billing time this year?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT AVG(CAST((billing_time - charge_time) AS INTERVAL) * 24 * 60 * 60) AS avg_diff
FROM (
  SELECT 
    person_id, 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (visit_start_datetime - visit_start_date)) AS charge_time, 
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (visit_end_datetime - visit_end_date)) AS billing_time
  FROM 
    visit_occurrence
  WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM visit_start_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
) AS subquery;

  JOIN visit_detail vd ON vo.visit_occurrence_id = vd.visit_occurrence_id
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON vo.person_id = co.person_id
  JOIN concept c ON co.condition_concept_id = c.concept_id
WHERE 
  c.domain_id = 'Anatomy' 
  AND c.standard_concept = 'S' 
  AND c.concept_class_id = 'Condition'
  AND ce.condition_era_start_date <= de.death_date
  AND ce.condition_era_end_date >= de.death_date
  AND vd.visit_type_concept_id = 409876
  AND c.concept_code = 'ICD9CM'
GROUP BY 
  ce.person_id, 
  ce.condition_era_start_date, 
  ce.condition_era_end_date
ORDER BY 
  total_hospital_cost DESC;

  JOIN drug_exposure de ON co.condition_concept_id = de.condition_concept_id

input: Determine the most influential features for discharge location.
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT 
  ce.condition_era_id, 
  ce.condition_concept_id, 
  ce.condition_era_start_date, 
  ce.condition_era_end_date, 
  ce.condition_occurrence_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ve.visit_occurrence_id) AS visit_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT de.drug_exposure_id) AS drug_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT me.measurement_id) AS measurement_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT pr.procedure_occurrence_id) AS procedure_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT se.specimen_id) AS specimen_count, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT nt.note_id) AS note_count
FROM 
  condition_era ce
  JOIN visit_occurrence ve ON ce.person_id = ve.person_id AND ce.condition_era_end_date = ve.visit_start_date
  LEFT JOIN drug_exposure de ON ce.person_id = de.person_id AND ce.condition_era_end_date = de.drug_exposure_end_date
  LEFT JOIN measurement me ON ce.person_id = me.person_id AND ce.condition_era_end_date = me.measurement_date
  LEFT JOIN procedure_occurrence pr ON ce.person_id = pr.person_id AND ce.condition_era_end_date = pr.procedure_date
  LEFT JOIN specimen se ON ce.person_id = se.person_id AND ce.condition_era_end_date = se.specimen_date
  LEFT JOIN note nt ON ce.person_id = nt.person_id AND ce.condition_era_end_date = nt.note_date
WHERE 
  ce.condition_era_end_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
  ce.condition_era_id, 
  ce.condition_concept_id, 
  ce.condition_era_start_date, 
  ce.condition_era_end_date, 
  ce.condition_occurrence_count
ORDER BY 
  visit_count DESC, 
  drug_count DESC, 
  measurement_count DESC, 
  procedure_count DESC, 
  specimen_count DESC, 
  note_count DESC;

  ce.drug_source_concept_id, 
  ce.route_source_value, 
  ce.dose_unit_source_value, 
  ce.measurement_concept_id, 
  ce.measurement_date, 
  ce.measurement_datetime, 
  ce.measurement_time, 
  ce.measurement_type_concept_id, 
  ce.operator_concept_id, 
  ce.value_as_number, 
  ce.value_as_concept_id, 
  ce.unit_concept_id, 
  ce.range_low, 
  ce.range_high, 
  ce.provider_id, 
  ce.visit_occurrence_id, 
  ce.visit_detail_id, 
  ce.measurement_source_value, 
  ce.measurement_source_concept_id, 
  ce.unit_source_value, 
  ce.unit_source_concept_id, 
  ce.value_source_value, 
  ce.measurement_event_id, 
  ce.meas_event_field_concept_id
FROM 
  drug_exposure ce
  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON ce.drug_exposure_id = co.drug_exposure_id
  JOIN condition_era cea ON ce.drug_exposure_id = cea.drug_exposure_id
WHERE 
  ce.drug_concept_id = 1146757
  AND cea.condition_era_start_date <= ce.drug_exposure_end_date
  AND cea.condition_era_end_date >= ce.drug_exposure_start_date
ORDER BY 
  ce.drug_exposure_id
LIMIT 10;

input: How long does patient <PERSON_ID>1931660402759123015</PERSON_ID>'s <PROCEDURE>4275142</PROCEDURE> end?

FROM 
  condition_occurrence e1

  AND e2.condition_start_date IS NOT NULL

input: What is the result of patient <PERSON_ID>3094956</PERSON_ID>'s last covid-19 test?

pred:
SELECT 
  m.value_as_number 
FROM 
  measurement m 
  JOIN concept c ON m.measurement_concept_id = c.concept_id 
WHERE 
  m.person_id = 3094956 
  AND c.concept_name = 'COVID-19 test result' 
  AND m.value_as_concept_id IN (
    SELECT 
      concept_id 
    FROM 
      concept 
    WHERE 
      concept_name IN ('Positive', 'Negative', 'Indeterminate')
  ) 
  AND m.measurement_date = (
    SELECT 
      MAX(m2.measurement_date) 
    FROM 
      measurement m2 
    WHERE 
      m2.person_id = 3094956 
      AND m2.measurement_concept_id = m.measurement_concept_id 
      AND m2.value_as_concept_id IN (
        SELECT 
          concept_id 
        FROM 
          concept 
        WHERE 
          concept_name IN ('Positive', 'Negative', 'Indeterminate')
      )
  );

input: Where is the most water found?

FROM

  JOIN condition_occurrence co ON c.concept_id = co.condition_concept_id 
  JOIN measurement m ON co.person_id = m.person_id 
  JOIN measurement_concept mc ON m.measurement_concept_id = mc.concept_id

input: What medication should be prescribed to patients with <CONDITION>4112814</CONDITION>?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT 
  d.concept_name 
FROM 
  concept c 
  JOIN drug_concept d ON c.concept_id = d.concept_id 
  JOIN drug_ingredient di ON d.concept_id = di.drug_concept_id 
  JOIN ingredient_ingredient ii ON di.ingredient_concept_id = ii.ingredient_concept_id 
  JOIN concept i ON ii.ingredient_concept_id = i.concept_id 
WHERE 
  c.concept_id IN (
    SELECT 
      ce.condition_concept_id 
    FROM 
      condition_era ce 
      JOIN condition_occurrence co ON ce.condition_concept_id = co.condition_concept_id 
    WHERE 
      ce.person_id IN (
        SELECT 
          p.person_id 
        FROM 
          person p 
          JOIN condition_occurrence co ON p.person_id = co.person_id 
        WHERE 
          co.condition_concept_id = 4112814 
      ) 
  ) 
  AND i.standard_concept = 'S';

input: Can i use <DRUG>1742258</DRUG> at what age?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT 
  p.year_of_birth, 
  p.month_of_birth, 
  p.day_of_birth, 
  COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT ce.condition_era_id), 0) AS condition_era_count 
FROM 
  person p 
  LEFT JOIN condition_era ce ON p.person_id = ce.person_id 
  LEFT JOIN condition_occurrence co ON ce.condition_era_id = co.condition_era_id 
  LEFT JOIN drug_exposure de ON co.condition_concept_id = de.condition_concept_id 
WHERE 
  de.drug_concept_id = (SELECT concept_id FROM concept WHERE concept_name = '<DRUG>1742258</DRUG>') 
  AND p.year_of_birth IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY 
  p.year_of_birth, p.month_of_birth, p.day_of_birth 
ORDER BY 
  p.year_of_birth;

input: What are the immuno-cancer drugs that have been on for the last 5 years.

FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN concept c ON de.drug_concept_id = c.concept_id
  JOIN concept e ON de.drug_type_concept_id = e.concept_id
WHERE

WHERE 
  c.concept_name = 'Blood Glucose' AND

input: Which <DRUG>43833975</DRUG> are the most prescribed?
gold: <NO_SQL>
pred:
SELECT 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  d.concept_name, 
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM 
  drug_exposure de
  JOIN concept d ON de.drug_concept_id = d.concept_id
WHERE 
  de.person_id IN (
    SELECT 
      pe.person_id
    FROM 
      person pe
      JOIN condition_occurrence co ON pe.person_id = co.person_id
      JOIN condition_era ce ON co.person_id = ce.person_id
    WHERE 
      ce.condition_concept_id = 43833975
  )
GROUP BY 
  d.drug_concept_id, 
  d.concept_name
ORDER BY 
  count DESC;
